audioConverter.title: Audio Converter
audioConverter.description: Convert audio files between different formats.
audioConverter.shortDescription: Convert audio files to various formats.
audioConverter.longDescription: This tool allows you to convert audio files from one format to another, supporting a wide range of audio formats for seamless conversion.
audioConverter.outputFormatDescription: Select the desired output audio format

convertToWebp.shortDescription: Convert Images to WebP Format with quality control.
convertToWebp.title: Convert Images to WebP
convertToWebp.failedToConvert: Conversion of image(s) to WebP failed. Please try again.

options.title: Conversion Settings
options.qualityDescription: Higher values = better quality, larger file size

options.title: Conversion Settings
